findings.description: Sections s3 (JdbcTransaction 1対1関係) and s4 (トランザクション名) are in reversed order compared to the source. The source presents: (1) データベースコネクション名, (2) トランザクション名, (3) JdbcTransaction関係, (4) 実装コード。The knowledge file index places s3=JdbcTransaction before s4=トランザクション名, reversing the original document structure.
findings.source_evidence: Source order: `------------------\nトランザクション名\n------------------` appears before `JdbcTransactionを使用した場合のトランザクション名とデータベースコネクション名の関係`

findings.description: Section s3 has an empty title string, but the corresponding source section has the explicit heading "JdbcTransactionを使用した場合のトランザクション名とデータベースコネクション名の関係".
findings.source_evidence: Source heading: `JdbcTransactionを使用した場合のトランザクション名とデータベースコネクション名の関係\n===================================================================================`

findings.description: The second transaction variable in the retrieval example is named `tran2`, but the source uses `tran` for both declarations (resulting in a duplicate variable declaration). The knowledge file silently modified the variable name without basis in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `Transaction tran = TransactionContext.getTransaction(TransactionContext.DEFAULT_TRANSACTION_CONTEXT_KEY);` followed by `Transaction tran = TransactionContext.getTransaction("user-schema");` — both use `tran`.
